About Me

Ahmedabad, India

QA Engineer

Hindi & English

Available

Crafting Quality.
Ensuring Excellence.

I am a QA Engineer with hands-on experience in website and mobile application testing, including admin panel and ERP system testing. I have contributed to on-demand marketplace and service-based projects, performing both functional and non-functional testing.

My responsibilities have included regression, smoke, sanity, and API testing, as well as test case design and defect reporting. I am proficient in tools like Jira and Trello, and I work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver quality software.

Additionally, I have completed internships in both frontend and backend development, giving me a well-rounded understanding of the full software development lifecycle — helping me think like a developer while testing like a QA.

Manual Testing API Testing Agile Methodology JIRA STLC / SDLC Mobile Testing Regression Testing UAT

Experience

My Professional Journey

Building quality software through hands-on testing, team collaboration, and continuous growth.

Jan 2024 – Present Technource Pvt. Ltd · Full-time
QA Engineer
Custom Software Development | AI · Blockchain · IoT · DevOps · Web & Mobile

Working at Technource Pvt. Ltd, a custom software development company specialising in AI, Blockchain, IoT, DevOps, and Web & Mobile App Development.

  • Collaborate closely with the Project Manager, Coordinator, and Senior Developer to understand requirements and ensure clarity before initiating QA tasks.
  • Independently identify and create test cases, followed by collaborative validation with seniors to ensure comprehensive test coverage and correctness.
  • Perform thorough manual testing, take feedback from senior team members, and iteratively improve test accuracy and quality based on suggestions.
  • Occasionally handle client-side task updates by updating Trello statuses with clear comments, keeping clients informed about bug resolutions and QA progress.
  • Actively involved in regression, smoke, sanity, API, and mobile application testing across multiple live projects.
Jan 2024 – Mar 2024 Internship
Manual QA Intern
Quality Assurance · 3 Months
  • Proficient in Manual, Functional, Regression, Smoke & Sanity Testing, and Bug Reporting.
  • Performed Test Case & Scenario Writing with focus on UI Testing — layout, alignment, font, colour, and responsiveness.
  • Conducted UAT, Mobile App (Android/iOS), and Admin Panel Testing.
  • Managed defect tracking using JIRA within an Agile team following SDLC/STLC processes.

ERP System

Technource ERP

On-Demand Marketplace

eSartor — On-demand Tailoring Platform

A unique on-demand tailoring services platform where tailors create and manage their own marketplace, offering fixed and custom services. Features include a bidding process, Stripe payments, subscription models, and direct chat between users and tailors.

UI/UX Testing

UI/UX Testing & Design Validation

Conducted comprehensive UI and UX testing for responsive web applications by validating layouts, typography, spacing, colors, icons, buttons, forms, and user interactions against Figma and Adobe XD designs. Performed responsive, cross-browser, accessibility, usability, and regression testing to ensure a seamless, pixel-perfect experience.

Beyond the Screen

Beyond software testing, I embrace passions that keep me active, creative, and inspired. Whether on the football field, the badminton court, or under the spotlight, each experience strengthens my confidence, discipline, and character.

⚽

Football

Football is more than just a game for me—it's a passion that teaches teamwork, discipline, strategy, and resilience. Every match challenges me to stay focused, make quick decisions, and continuously improve, qualities that also strengthen my approach as a QA Engineer.

Fashion & Modeling
